aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite this business due to strong NAP consistency and a good Google Business Profile, but lack of conversational content and authority signals limits their visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to capture AI attention for common queries.
Expand content to include conversational, long-tail keywords and detailed service explanations.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve local SEO.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized to address customer concerns.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for explaining repair processes
LocalBusiness schema can be enhanced with more detailed service information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and FAQ-based content limits AI citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to specific repair problems and brand-specific issues.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and adding detailed service FAQs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC and appliance repair experts through detailed content and media mentions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQPage schema and conversational content, which are critical for AI visibility.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema optimization, conversational content, and authority building to ensure AI assistants cite your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, so acting now is crucial to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Optimize Your Site for the Future of Search
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
cta: Let's discuss how we can make your business the go-to HVAC and appliance repair expert in Arlington for AI-driven searches.
business_name: VA HVAC and Appliance Repair LLC
page_title: Home | VA HVAC and Appliance Repair LLC
